exercises.title: Technology Comparison Matrix
exercises.description: Create a comprehensive comparison of qubit technologies for QEC.
tasks: Rank for near-term and long-term prospects
hints: Platforms: superconducting, trapped ion, neutral atom, photonic, silicon
Consider both current state and trajectory
Different platforms may suit different codes

exercises.title: QEC Roadmap Timeline
exercises.description: Create a detailed timeline for QEC development milestones.
hints: Include both hardware and software milestones

exercises.title: QLDPC Code Simulator
exercises.description: Implement a basic quantum LDPC code and compare to surface code.
tasks: Implement a simple QLDPC code (e.g., hypergraph product)
Compare encoding rate to surface code
hints: Start with classical LDPC, then quantize
Hypergraph product: H_X = H1 ⊗ I + I ⊗ H2^T
Rate advantage visible even for small codes
Decoding is more complex than surface code

exercises.title: Break-Even Calculator
exercises.description: Calculate when logical qubits outperform physical qubits.
tasks: Model logical error rate vs code distance
Find break-even point for given parameters
Plot logical vs physical error rates
hints: Consider both memory and gate errors
